chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.NO.D-7002/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ Fresh case. === 1. For order on 34923/2015 2. For order on Misc. 34924/2015 3. For order on Misc.34925/2015 4. For hearing of main case 10.11.2015 Mr. Shaikh Jehangir Ishtiaq, advocate for petitioner. ------------------------- Counsel for the petitioner states that similar petitions i.e. C.P. No.D-3195/2015 and others involving common questions of law and facts were heard and reserved and this petition may also be decided alongwith the said petitions. Order accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE sharif
